note: Plain email -- floor:email on all three surfaces (EMAIL_RE is byte-identical).
Canonical ISO 13616 GB82 test IBAN -- mod-97 VALID, so floor:iban fires (no precision risk). A drift in _iban_ok / ibanOk on any surface drops this. Synthetic public test vector, not a real account.
Luhn-VALID 16-digit Visa test number -- floor:card. A drift in _luhn_ok / luhnOk or the 15/16-digit gate drops this. Public Luhn test vector, not a real card.

Luhn-VALID 9-digit value (public SIN test vector 046454286) with a preceding NAS cue and OQLF 3-3-3 spacing. Must emit government_id on all three. The cue forces emission even past BN suppression (never-leak SIN-cue override). value is the digit-normalized form so the assert is separator-agnostic.

SAME Luhn-VALID 9-digit value, but immediately followed by an RT0001 program account and with NO SIN cue -> it is a Canadian Business Number (GST/QST registration printed on invoices), NOT a SIN. Must be SUPPRESSED on all three (no government_id span). suppress lists the label that must be ABSENT.
text: Fournisseur TPS 046454286 RT0001 sur la facture.

note: 8-4-4-4-12 hex UUID -- floor:uuid, emitted as sensitive_account_id on all three (UUID_RE is byte-identical). Synthetic id, never occurs by accident in prose.
